title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.1295 - Effective date — application dates
text:
375.1295.  Effective date — application dates. — 1.  Sections 375.1280 to 375.1295 shall apply to all assumption reinsurance agreements entered into on or after August 28, 1993.
  2.  Any person who prior to August 28, 1993, committed any act punishable under subsection 10 of section 375.241 may be punished under the provisions of such subsection as it existed prior to August 28, 1993, on any date on or after August 28, 1993.
(L. 1993 H.B. 709 § 20)
